commands.cmd: read-only migration, validation, authorization, update, current-view behavior and deferred-boundary review

summary: Approved three immediately operative private display preferences and rejected premature macro/card/planner switches.
deviations: The exact GoalBuddy Judge exceeded the single-wait limit and was interrupted; the PM performed the same review as permitted fallback.
remaining_blockers: The approved additive preference vertical must be delivered and audited.
Macro mode, card/planner flags, aggregate/source datasets, weight and household views remain later tasks.
